appliedUpdates.description: Added clarification on effectiveSources vs enabledSources distinction in routing pipeline: effectiveSources is resolved from sourcePreset and filters at detect stage; enabledSources is used at list stage consistent with already-filtered detections

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance on positive-control testing for routing assertions: when validating that a preset excludes a lane family, the test should start from a state where both families are discoverable so the exclusion is non-vacuous. This is particularly important for VAL-ROUTE-005 and similar truth-table validations.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature discovery-routing-enforcement-and-nonexecution-evidence had non-blocking gaps in VAL-ROUTE-004 and VAL-ROUTE-005 coverage due to tests that didn't start from a positive-control baseline where both ATS and browser lanes were discoverable before routing gates were applied.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker followed discovery-integration-worker SKILL.md correctly; no skill update needed
rejectedObservations.reason: observation is confirmation, not a gap
